hb4e3e4fag3073g491egbec3g170cd8411e09: Was a time I tussled with hill giants without breaking a sweat.
h0cf8ef97g6b20g4f1cgac5dgbcd9aae79ab1: Now, a mere werebear could swat me halfway to Amn.
h8d9f6b3bgbc11g4e5cgbdc3gc128868730c9: Strange things are happening to us. What festers in our minds may well impel our bodies.
